title: CNPA Three Year Strategic Plan 2023/26
body: "The CNPA set out an ambitious three-year Strategic Plan  in 2020, requiring significant changes in its approach to business, projects and technology.  This Strategic Plan looks ahead to the period 2023/26. It will build on the previous work, acknowledge our achievements, and recognise where there is more work to do. Key to the success of this approach is our stakeholders, working in partnership to make the CNC resilient, enhance its efficiency and effectiveness, whilst delivering our 24/7 policing response. "
